message:
feat(readwrite,python): add graph_attrs and directed flag to JSON graph serialization

- Introduce JsonGraphPayload struct with directed flag and graph_attrs
  fields for richer JSON graph round-tripping
- Update write_json_graph and write_digraph_json_graph to accept
  optional graph_attrs via new _with_graph_attrs variants
- Add legacy GraphSnapshot/DiGraphSnapshot fallback parsing so existing
  JSON payloads without the new fields still deserialize correctly
- Fix node_link_graph to dispatch directed payloads through
  read_digraph_json_graph instead of always using the undirected path
- Fix MultiDirected edge_keys lookup: use .first().copied() instead of
  .next() to avoid borrow-checker issues with the iterator API
- Rename unused average_shortest_path_length_undirected to prefixed _
  variant with explanatory comment
- Add Rust unit tests for graph_attrs preservation and directed flag
- Add Python integration tests for node_link_data/node_link_graph
  round-trip with graph attrs and directed type preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 from pathlib import Path
 
 import franken_networkx as fnx
+import franken_networkx._fnx as _fnx
 import networkx as nx
 
 
@@ -146,3 +147,30 @@ def test_rust_write_graphml_preserves_graph_attrs(tmp_path: Path):
     assert '<data key="g0">demo</data>' in content
     assert '<data key="g1">true</data>' in content
     assert '<data key="g2">3</data>' in content
+
+
+def test_raw_node_link_data_preserves_graph_attrs_and_directed_flag():
+    graph = fnx.DiGraph()
+    graph.add_edge("a", "b")
+    graph.graph["name"] = "demo"
+    graph.graph["version"] = 3
+
+    payload = _fnx.node_link_data(graph)
+
+    assert payload["directed"] is True
+    assert payload["graph_attrs"] == {"name": "demo", "version": 3}
+
+
+def test_raw_node_link_graph_preserves_directed_type_and_graph_attrs():
+    payload = {
+        "mode": "strict",
+        "directed": True,
+        "graph_attrs": {"name": "demo", "version": 3},
+        "nodes": ["a", "b"],
+        "edges": [{"left": "a", "right": "b", "attrs": {}}],
+    }
+
+    graph = _fnx.node_link_graph(payload)
+
+    assert graph.is_directed()
+    assert dict(graph.graph) == {"name": "demo", "version": 3}
